name: @block-agent/app-oa_proxy
description: oa_proxy BlockApp: projects the OA org directory into agent context as a stable block and provides the org_directory contract. HTTP client to the OA service is isolated here; @block-agent/core never imports it.
$exports_note: exports point at .ts SOURCE (no build). Importers use '@block-agent/app-oa_proxy/manifest.js'. ORG_DIRECTORY ContractDef is re-exported from manifest for launch to register (same pattern as MESSAGE_COUNT/TASK_COUNT).

blockAgent.summary: 把 OA 组织目录投影为 stable 块，并提供 org_directory 契约。
